import io
import string
import list

fn parse_ints(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut tok = ""
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(s)
  while i < n
    let b = match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
      if not string.is_empty(tok)
        match string.parse_int(tok)
        when Some(v)
          result = list.push(result, v)
        when None
          ()
        end
        tok = ""
      end
    else
      tok = "#{tok}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if not string.is_empty(tok)
    match string.parse_int(tok)
    when Some(v)
      result = list.push(result, v)
    when None
      ()
    end
  end
  result
end

fn max_index(_ xs: List<Int>) -> Int
  mut best_i = 0
  mut best_v = match list.get(xs, 0)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
  mut i = 1
  let n = list.len(xs)
  while i < n
    match list.get(xs, i)
    when Some(v)
      if v > best_v
        best_v = v
        best_i = i
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  best_i
end

fn remove_at(_ xs: List<Int>, _ idx: Int) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  let n = list.len(xs)
  while i < n
    if i != idx
      match list.get(xs, i)
      when Some(v)
        result = list.push(result, v)
      when None
        ()
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

let line1 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let line2 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let nums = parse_ints(line1)
let k_input = match string.parse_int(string.trim(line2))
when Some(n)
  n
when None
  0
end

let total = list.len(nums)
let take = if k_input < total
  k_input
else
  total
end

mut remaining = nums
mut output = ""
mut produced = 0
while produced < take
  let idx = max_index(remaining)
  let v = match list.get(remaining, idx)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  if produced == 0
    output = "#{v}"
  else
    output = "#{output} #{v}"
  end
  remaining = remove_at(remaining, idx)
  produced = produced + 1
end

println(output)
